allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('/e/mlops/paperless_data_integration/provision_chameleon.ipynb'\)\); print\(f'cells: {len\(nb[\\"cells\\"]\)}'\); [print\(i, c['cell_type'], \(c.get\('source',['']\)[0][:80] if c.get\('source'\) else ''\).replace\(chr\(10\),' '\)\) for i,c in enumerate\(nb['cells']\)]")

PowerShell(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('E:/mlops/paperless_data_integration/provision_chameleon.ipynb', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('cells:', len\(nb['cells']\)\); [print\(i, c['cell_type'], \(\(c.get\('source'\) or ['']\)[0][:80] if isinstance\(c.get\('source'\), list\) else \(c.get\('source',''\)[:80] if c.get\('source'\) else ''\)\).replace\(chr\(10\),' '\)\) for i,c in enumerate\(nb['cells']\)]")
